name: Bengal Lancers Shrimp Curry (Jhinka Masala)
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Medium shrimp, peeled, deveined, tails left on
2 tbsp Mustard oil or light olive oil
Freshly cooked basmati rice or long-grain rice
recipeInstructions:
1. Sprinkle shrimp with salt and turmeric. Toss well to coat; cover and set aside for 15 minutes.
2. Combine mustard seeds, cumin seeds, garlic, ginger, chiles, and lemon juice in a blender and puree. Set aside.
3. Heat oil in a large heavy skillet over medium-high heat. Add onions and cook until soft, about 3 minutes.
4. Add the pureed spice mixture. Cook, stirring, until fragrant, about 5 minutes.
5. Stir in tomato and cook until soft. Add shrimp, stir gently to coat them evenly.
6. Pour in water and bring to a boil, stirring constantly.
7. Reduce heat to medium, cover, and cook until shrimp are just opaque, about 5 minutes.
8. Mound rice into heated serving plates. Spoon curry over and serve.
